reviews.comment:
If you need any signage made or branding done to your vehicle, Frederick Wraps & Graphics is 100% the place to go. Had them create an aluminum sign for my landscaping business that I could install on my utility trailer - turned out perfect. Provided them with a design I created and they made it exactly how I wanted. Had them brand my truck with my logo, phone number, and website and it couldn't have turned out any better. I wasn't entirely sure how I wanted the truck to look - but Diogo and Mason both gave their insights and also provided me with images beforehand so I could see a preview of the design to confirm if I liked it. Came out looking awesome and I am super happy I had them do it.

Communication was a breeze. Diogo was awesome to work with and I really appreciate how engaged in communication he was with me through the entire process - you don't really get that anywhere else.

Great prices, very professional people, and high quality work. I will definitely be doing more business with them in the future.

Their communication was great and they got it done even earlier than I expected, I will definitely be back for some shirts in the future!

reviews.comment: As the owner of B-Dub's Island Soul Foodtruck and Catering Co, Frederick Wraps and Graphics is hands down my favorite wraps and graphic company!!! They are the only ones I trust with bringing my vision to reality and have ALWAYS far exceeded my expectations. Joe, Sharon and the rest of the team are so knowledgeable, helpful and simply down right GREAT people, who's main objective is to help you meet your business goals by enhancing, spotlighting and bringing awareness to your brand. I recommend them for ALL your wrap and graphic needs

reviews.comment:
These guys crushed it! I ordered some custom tees and they came out way better than I expected. Super soft shirts, the print was clean and sharp, and the colors really popped. They even helped tweak my design a bit to make sure it looked perfect on a shirt.

Fast turnaround, great communication, and just an overall solid experience. If you’re looking for quality printing and cool people to work with, this is the place. I’ll definitely be coming back for more.
